---
title: "Research"
description: "Journal articles, working drafts, and other projects on constitution-making, public consultation, and U.S. immigration enforcement."
title-block-banner: "#844247"
listing:
  - id: articles
    contents: "articles/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/research/listing.ejs
    categories: true
  - id: works-in-progress
    contents: "works-in-progress/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "sort asc"
    template: ../html/research/listing.ejs
page-layout: full
include-back-link: false
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="va-sec"><h2>Journal articles<span class="dot">.</span></h2></div>
```

::: {#articles}
:::

```{=html}
<div class="va-sec"><h2>Works in progress<span class="dot">.</span></h2></div>
```

::: {#works-in-progress}
:::

```{=html}
<div class="va-sec" id="other-works-section"><h2>Other works<span class="dot">.</span></h2></div>
<div class="other-works" id="other-works-list">
  <div class="va-otherwork" data-categories="Chile,Constitutional design">
    <span class="type">Data story</span>
    <div>
      <a class="ow-title" href="https://www.constituteproject.org/data-stories/chile-2023-proposal">12 Core Attributes of the Chilean Constitutional Proposal</a>
      <div class="ow-meta">
        <span>Zachary Elkins, <b>Matthew Martin</b>, Ashley Moran &amp; Guillermo P&eacute;rez</span>
        <span class="dot">·</span>
        <span class="venue">Constitute Project</span>
        <span class="dot">·</span>
        <span class="year">2023</span>
      </div>
      <div class="va-pubtags">
        <span class="va-pubtag listing-category" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory && window.quartoListingCategory('Chile'); return false;">Chile</span>
        <span class="va-pubtag listing-category" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory && window.quartoListingCategory('Constitutional design'); return false;">Constitutional design</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="va-otherwork" data-categories="Chile,Constitutional design">
    <span class="type">Translation</span>
    <div>
      <a class="ow-title" href="https://www.constituteproject.org/constitution/Chile_2023DD">Chile 2023 &mdash; Draft of 30 Oct 2023</a>
      <div class="ow-meta">
        <span><b>Matthew Martin</b> &amp; Guillermo P&eacute;rez</span>
        <span class="dot">·</span>
        <span class="venue">Constitute Project</span>
        <span class="dot">·</span>
        <span class="year">2023</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ow-note">Translation of the Chilean constitutional proposal</div>
      <div class="va-pubtags">
        <span class="va-pubtag listing-category" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory && window.quartoListingCategory('Chile'); return false;">Chile</span>
        <span class="va-pubtag listing-category" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory && window.quartoListingCategory('Constitutional design'); return false;">Constitutional design</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="other-works-empty" class="listing-no-matching" style="display: none;">No matching items</div>
</div>
<script>
(function () {
  function syncOtherWorks() {
    var active = document.querySelector('.quarto-listing-category .category.active');
    var cat = (active && active.dataset.category) ? active.dataset.category : '';
    var entries = document.querySelectorAll('#other-works-list .va-otherwork');
    var empty = document.getElementById('other-works-empty');
    var anyVisible = false;
    entries.forEach(function (el) {
      var cats = (el.dataset.categories || '').split(',').map(function (s) { return s.trim(); });
      var show = !cat || cats.indexOf(cat) !== -1;
      el.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
      if (show) anyVisible = true;
    });
    if (empty) empty.style.display = (cat && !anyVisible) ? '' : 'none';
  }
  function updateSidebarCounts() {
    var entries = document.querySelectorAll('#other-works-list .va-otherwork');
    var bumps = {};
    entries.forEach(function (el) {
      (el.dataset.categories || '').split(',').forEach(function (raw) {
        var c = raw.trim();
        if (!c) return;
        bumps[c] = (bumps[c] || 0) + 1;
      });
    });
    var total = entries.length;
    var allEl = document.querySelector(".quarto-listing-category .category[data-category='']");
    if (allEl) {
      var countEl = allEl.querySelector('.quarto-category-count');
      if (countEl) {
        var n = parseInt(countEl.textContent.replace(/[^0-9]/g, ''), 10) || 0;
        countEl.textContent = '(' + (n + total) + ')';
      }
    }
    Object.keys(bumps).forEach(function (cat) {
      var el = document.querySelector(".quarto-listing-category .category[data-category='" + cat.replace(/'/g, "\\'") + "']");
      if (el) {
        var countEl = el.querySelector('.quarto-category-count');
        if (countEl) {
          var n = parseInt(countEl.textContent.replace(/[^0-9]/g, ''), 10) || 0;
          countEl.textContent = '(' + (n + bumps[cat]) + ')';
        }
      }
    });
  }
  function start() {
    updateSidebarCounts();
    syncOtherWorks();
    var sidebar = document.querySelector('.quarto-listing-category');
    if (sidebar) {
      new MutationObserver(syncOtherWorks).observe(sidebar, {
        attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'], subtree: true
      });
    }
  }
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', start);
  } else {
    start();
  }
})();
</script>
```
